properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v4 v2 v3 v5 v3

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: I surrender I will yield I will bow down I will live I will seek You All my days I will follow All Your ways

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: 'Cause You are my only One You are my only One

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: I want to live for You Be glorified forever My life will declare You alone are Lord Everything of me Use it for Your glory That everyone will see Will hear, will know You are Lord of all

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: I will worship I will praise I will lift up Your Holy Name I will give You All the glory All the honor Due Your Name

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: Here I am, Lord, mold me Here I am, Lord, use me Here I am, Lord, send me For Your glory
